# My Feng Shui Home

> A feng shui guide for real homes, written by an architect. Free Kua number calculator, room walkthrough method, a 14-point room harmony checklist, and a small library of paid printable guides. Educational. Not a consultation. Not a fortune. No outcome promises.

The site is built around three free pillars and a small set of paid printables. The free pillars are the Kua number calculator at /kua-calculator, the Ultimate Feng Shui Guide at /guide, and the methodology deep dive at /methodology. The paid printables ship from /products and are sold as one-time PDFs once checkout is live.

Voice rules used across every page: second-person, present-tense. No outcome promises. No consultation language. No em dashes. The site separates testable design choices from traditional symbolism and names which is which on every page.

The Kua calculator runs entirely in the visitor's browser and never sends birth data anywhere. The iframe-embeddable widget at /embed is a chrome-free build of the same calculator and carries no third-party JavaScript.

## Core free tools

- [Kua number calculator](https://myfengshuihome.com/kua-calculator): ten-second calculator that returns a visitor's Kua number, East or West group, and eight personal directions. Runs in the browser; no birth data leaves the page.
- [Ultimate Feng Shui Guide](https://myfengshuihome.com/guide): eleven clusters of structured pages covering the bagua, the schools, the cures, and the room-by-room walkthrough.
- [Methodology](https://myfengshuihome.com/methodology): the Compass School and Eight Mansions system explained in nine sections.
- [14-point room harmony checklist](https://myfengshuihome.com/checklist): a one-page printable used as the lead magnet.
- [Iframe-embeddable calculator](https://myfengshuihome.com/embed): chrome-free, tracker-free build of the calculator for external sites.

## Guide highlights

- [Find your Kua number and your four directions](https://myfengshuihome.com/guide/compass-school/find-your-kua-number): East/West group split, the four favourable directions, and how to handle a mixed-group household.
- [How to read any room](https://myfengshuihome.com/guide/rooms/how-to-read-any-room): the four-thing walkthrough the rest of the room work runs on.
- [Bedroom, kitchen, and front door](https://myfengshuihome.com/guide/rooms/bedroom-kitchen-front-door): the three rooms that compound hardest, read room by room.
- [The southeast wealth area and how to read it](https://myfengshuihome.com/guide/money/the-southeast-wealth-area-and-how-to-read-it): the wealth corner read in six levers, no manifestation language.
- [Annual cures vs permanent fixes](https://myfengshuihome.com/guide/cures/annual-cures-vs-permanent-fixes): which cures reset at Li Chun and which stay put for years.
- [Flying Stars, BTB, and when timing enters the picture](https://myfengshuihome.com/guide/schools/flying-stars-btb-and-timing): the annual layer of Flying Stars and the alternate lineage of BTB, kept separate.
- [What the Bagua is](https://myfengshuihome.com/guide/bagua/what-the-bagua-is): the map layer laid over a real floor plan.
- [The nine life areas](https://myfengshuihome.com/guide/bagua/the-nine-life-areas): nine sectors named one by one with the supportive direction for each.
- [The five elements as a design language](https://myfengshuihome.com/guide/five-elements/five-elements-as-a-design-language): Wu Xing as a vocabulary, not a mystical code.
- [Five-element cures, room by room](https://myfengshuihome.com/guide/cures/five-element-cures-room-by-room): which element cure belongs in which room.

## Products (printable, one-time)

- [2026 Feng Shui Planner: Mid-Year Edition](https://myfengshuihome.com/products/annual-feng-shui-planner-2026): printable book of more than 80 pages covering July 2026 through February 2027 of the 2026 Chinese solar year. Available now, $19, one-time.
- [Personal Feng Shui Compass](https://myfengshuihome.com/products/personal-feng-shui-compass): printable book keyed to the reader's Kua and eight personal directions. File finished; checkout not live yet.
- [Move-In Kit](https://myfengshuihome.com/products/move-in-kit): traditional date selection plus a first-week activation checklist. In development.
- [Bedroom Reset](https://myfengshuihome.com/products/bedroom-reset): focused printable walking the bedroom from the door inward against the reader's Kua. In development.
- [Business and Money Kit](https://myfengshuihome.com/products/business-money-feng-shui): focused printable reading the money channel for home and work. In development.
- [Products shelf](https://myfengshuihome.com/products): the full shop, with launch-state notes on every product.

## Policies

- [Privacy](https://myfengshuihome.com/privacy): the calculator core and the /embed widget never send birth data anywhere. The account layer at /account stores only data the user chooses to save.
- Framing rule: outcome promises are not used anywhere on the site. Every page names which claims come from tradition and which are testable design choices.
- No em dashes anywhere on the site.

## Optional

- [Articles](https://myfengshuihome.com/articles): teaser-length essays on common feng shui questions. Free with no account.
- [Sign in](https://myfengshuihome.com/sign-in): optional free account to save and email a chart.
- Contact: hello@myfengshuihome.com.
